---
title: "R语言编程基础"
---

##第一次课的几个例子

# 基本运算，求均值，求和 等等


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
mean(c(1,2,3))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 2
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
knitr::kable(head(iris, 10))
```

::: {.cell-output-display}


| Sepal.Length| Sepal.Width| Petal.Length| Petal.Width|Species |
|------------:|-----------:|------------:|-----------:|:-------|
|          5.1|         3.5|          1.4|         0.2|setosa  |
|          4.9|         3.0|          1.4|         0.2|setosa  |
|          4.7|         3.2|          1.3|         0.2|setosa  |
|          4.6|         3.1|          1.5|         0.2|setosa  |
|          5.0|         3.6|          1.4|         0.2|setosa  |
|          5.4|         3.9|          1.7|         0.4|setosa  |
|          4.6|         3.4|          1.4|         0.3|setosa  |
|          5.0|         3.4|          1.5|         0.2|setosa  |
|          4.4|         2.9|          1.4|         0.2|setosa  |
|          4.9|         3.1|          1.5|         0.1|setosa  |


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
apply(mtcars,2,mean)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
       mpg        cyl       disp         hp       drat         wt       qsec 
 20.090625   6.187500 230.721875 146.687500   3.596563   3.217250  17.848750 
        vs         am       gear       carb 
  0.437500   0.406250   3.687500   2.812500 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
apply(mtcars,1,mean)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}


# 统计功能


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
rnorm(10)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
 [1] -0.7596257 -0.5787691  1.2969196  0.6417998 -1.1961159 -0.2409087
 [7]  0.6874436  0.1385956 -0.2584272 -1.1648015
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
pnorm(0)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 0.5
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
t.test(rnorm(10),rnorm(10))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

	Welch Two Sample t-test

data:  rnorm(10) and rnorm(10)
t = 0.45282, df = 16.651, p-value = 0.6565
alternative hypothesis: true difference in means is not equal to 0
95 percent confidence interval:
 -0.7123118  1.1008410
sample estimates:
 mean of x  mean of y 
-0.0145205 -0.2087851 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
cor(mtcars)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}


# 循环运算 向量化运算

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
replicate(10,t.test(rnorm(10),rnorm(10)))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
            [,1]                      [,2]
```

:::

```{.r .cell-code}
system.time(replicate(10,t.test(rnorm(10),rnorm(10))))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
   user  system elapsed 
      0       0       0 
```


:::
:::


# 模型拟合


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
attach(iris)
names(iris)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "Sepal.Length" "Sepal.Width"  "Petal.Length" "Petal.Width"  "Species"     
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
lm(Sepal.Length~Sepal.Width)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

Call:
lm(formula = Sepal.Length ~ Sepal.Width)

Coefficients:
(Intercept)  Sepal.Width  
     6.5262      -0.2234  
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
detach(iris)
```
:::


# 画图功能


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(lme4)
library(lattice)
attach(sleepstudy)
attach(iris)
head(sleepstudy)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  Reaction Days Subject
1 249.5600    0     308
2 258.7047    1     308
3 250.8006    2     308
4 321.4398    3     308
5 356.8519    4     308
6 414.6901    5     308
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
plot(Reaction~Days)
abline(lm(Reaction~Days))
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](lecture1_files/figure-html/plot-1.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
xyplot(Reaction~Days|factor(Subject),
       type=c('p', 'r'),col.line='black')
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](lecture1_files/figure-html/plot-2.png){width=672}
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
xyplot(Sepal.Length~Sepal.Width|Species)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](lecture1_files/figure-html/plot-3.png){width=672}
:::
:::


#高级画图功能


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
ggdiamonds = ggplot(diamonds, aes(x, depth)) +
  stat_density_2d(aes(fill = stat(nlevel)), geom = "polygon", n = 200, bins = 50,contour = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(clarity~.) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "A")
# library(rayshader)
# plot_gg(ggdiamonds,multicore=TRUE,width=5,height=5,scale=250,windowsize=c(1400,866),
#         zoom = 0.55, phi = 30)
```
:::
